About Us

Leading the future of packaging automation with innovative solutions and unmatched expertise since 1999.

Our Mission

At Packaging Automation Solutions, we are dedicated to transforming the packaging industry through cutting-edge automation technology. Our mission is to help businesses achieve higher efficiency, better quality, and sustainable growth.

With over 25 years of experience and 500+ successful projects across 15 countries, we have established ourselves as a trusted partner for companies seeking to modernize their packaging operations.

Company Image Placeholder

Our Core Values

The principles that guide everything we do

Innovation

Constantly pushing boundaries to deliver cutting-edge automation solutions.

Quality

Uncompromising commitment to excellence in every project we undertake.

Partnership

Building lasting relationships through trust, transparency, and collaboration.

Global Reach

Serving clients across 15 countries with local expertise and global standards.

Our Journey

Milestones that shaped our company

1999

Company Founded

Started as a small packaging consultancy in Malaysia.

2005

First Major Project

Completed first large-scale automation project for a pharmaceutical company.

2010

International Expansion

Expanded operations to Singapore and Indonesia.

2015

Technology Innovation Center

Opened dedicated R&D facility for automation technology.

2020

500th Project Milestone

Successfully completed 500th automation project across 15 countries.

2026

Industry Leader

Recognized as leading packaging automation provider in Southeast Asia.
